'''R4-C9''' was an [[R4 astromech droid/Legends|R4-series]] [[agromech droid]], with an R2-series dome, used by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]], when piloting his [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Jedi interceptor]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] in the [[19 BBY/Legends|late stages]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was colored yellow and gray, unlike the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter's]] hue.

{{Droid-stub}}
